result.anchor_clause: "...(with respect to any interest payment due on or after February 1, 2026 and prior to March 1, 2026, which shall not constitute an Event of Default unless such Loan Party fails to make such interest payment on or prior to March 19, 2026) or any other amount payable hereunder or with respect to any other Loan Document..."
result.admin_agent: Administrative Agent (not named in the provided text); Alter Domus (US) LLC referenced as consenting party under Section 9(b) of the 2023 Incremental and Refinancing Amendment

lme_vectors.rationale: This is a narrow grace-period amendment extending the cure period for a specific interest payment; it does not address lender priming, sacred rights, or pro rata protections.
lme_vectors.basis: The Amendment only modifies the Event of Default provision to grant a payment grace period; no priming or voting provisions are amended.
lme_vectors.quote: this Amendment shall not by implication or otherwise limit, impair, constitute a waiver of or otherwise affect the rights and remedies of the Lenders or the Administrative Agent

lme_vectors.rationale: The text contains no provisions concerning unrestricted subsidiaries, IP/asset transfers, or investment capacity.
lme_vectors.basis: Amendment scope is limited to interest-payment grace period and effectiveness conditions.
lme_vectors.quote: Except as expressly set forth herein, this Amendment shall not by implication or otherwise limit, impair, constitute a waiver of or otherwise affect the rights and remedies of the Lenders

lme_vectors.rationale: No incremental facility, ratio debt, or MFN provisions appear in the provided text.
lme_vectors.basis: Only a reference to the pre-existing 2023 Incremental and Refinancing Amendment for consent purposes; no incremental capacity is created or amended here.
lme_vectors.quote: the written consent of Alter Domus (US) LLC consenting to this Amendment in accordance with Section 9(b) of the 2023 Incremental and Refinancing Amendment

lme_vectors.rationale: No restricted payments, distributions, or related baskets are addressed in the provided clauses.
lme_vectors.basis: The Amendment ratifies all existing covenants unchanged and adds only a payment grace period.
lme_vectors.quote: all of which are ratified and affirmed in all respects and shall continue in full force and effect

result.guarantors: Not specified in the provided text; the Loan Parties comprise Holdings (Trinseo LuxCo S.à r.l.), the Lead Borrower (Trinseo Holding S.à r.l.) and the Co-Borrower (Trinseo Materials Finance, Inc.)

Section 3. Amendment Effective Date. This Amendment and the amendments to the
Existing Credit Agreement contained in Section 2 hereof shall become effective
as of the first date (the “ Amendment Effective Date ”) on which each of the
following conditions shall have been satisfied (or waived by the Consenting
Lenders):
                                                                       
  (a)  the Administrative Agent (or its counsel) shall have received:  
                                                                       
                                                                               
  i.    a counterpart signature page of this Amendment duly executed by        
        Holdings, the Borrowers, and the Consenting Lenders; and               
                                                                               
                                                                               
         the written consent of Alter Domus (US) LLC consenting to this        
  ii.    Amendment in accordance with Section 9(b) of the 2023 Incremental     
         and Refinancing Amendment.                                            
                                                                               
Section 4. Effect of Amendment .
                                                                               
       Except as expressly set forth herein, this Amendment shall not by       
       implication or otherwise limit, impair, constitute a waiver of or       
       otherwise affect the rights and remedies of the Lenders or the          
       Administrative Agent under the Existing Credit Agreement or any other   
       Loan Document, and shall not alter, modify, amend or in any way affect  
       any of the terms, conditions, obligations, covenants or agreements      
       contained in the Existing Credit Agreement or any other provision of    
  (a)  the Existing Credit Agreement or of any other Loan Document, all of     
       which are ratified and affirmed in all respects and shall continue in   
       full force and effect. Nothing herein shall be deemed to entitle        
       either Borrower or any other Loan Party to a consent to, or a waiver,   
       amendment, modification or other change of, any of the terms,           
       conditions, obligations, covenants or agreements contained in the       
       Amended Credit Agreement or any other Loan Document in similar or       
       different circumstances.
